summary: Comprehensive testing of Pantry Quarantine and Recipe Duplicate Warning features (Prompt P1). All pantry quarantine flows tested and passing. Recipe duplicate warning tested for Step 1 scenarios and normalization rules. Step 5 scenario verified through code review.

design_issues.issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge occasionally blocks button clicks in wizard
design_issues.workaround: Use force=True in Playwright or adjust z-index of badge

passed_tests: PANTRY QUARANTINE TEST 1: Create new ingredient flow lands on form step (NOT auto-close) - 'Pendiente' banner visible
PANTRY QUARANTINE TEST 2: Saving from form persists with user_ingredient_id - 'Pendiente' pill shows in pantry list
PANTRY QUARANTINE TEST 3: 'Por categoría' view groups quarantine items under 'Pendientes de validación'
PANTRY QUARANTINE TEST 4: MOD-001 search surfaces previously-created quarantine items with 'Pendiente' pill
PANTRY QUARANTINE TEST 5: MOD-002 edit shows base-unit-only dropdown + helper text 'Unidad base. Más unidades disponibles cuando el admin valide este ingrediente.'
PANTRY QUARANTINE TEST 6: Catalog flow still works - no 'Pendiente' banner, multiple units available
PANTRY QUARANTINE TEST 7: 'Marcar como básico' toggle mutes Cantidad and Unidad fields (bg-surface-secondary, disabled, value cleared)
RECIPE DUPLICATE TEST 8: Warning fires on Step 1 with correct dialog title 'Ya tienes una receta llamada así' and body showing duplicate title
RECIPE DUPLICATE TEST 9: 'Editar título' on Step 1 closes dialog and keeps user on Step 1 without creating draft
RECIPE DUPLICATE TEST 10: 'Guardar igualmente' on Step 1 proceeds to Step 2 and creates draft
RECIPE DUPLICATE TEST 11: Normalization rules work correctly - trim+lowercase comparison, accent-SENSITIVE (uppercase matches, spaces trimmed, accented version does NOT match)
RECIPE DUPLICATE TEST 12: Drafts excluded from duplicate check (verified by code review - checkDuplicateTitle filters by is_draft=false)
RECIPE DUPLICATE TEST 13: Step 5 duplicate warning and 'Editar título' navigation (verified by code review - same checkDuplicateTitle function, setStep(1) on cancel)

pantry_quarantine_features.create_flow: ✅ PASS - Modal continues to form step after 'Crear y continuar', does NOT auto-close. 'Pendiente' banner visible with correct text.
pantry_quarantine_features.form_step: ✅ PASS - Only base unit (gramo or mililitro) available in dropdown. Helper text 'Unidad base. Más unidades disponibles cuando el admin valide este ingrediente.' displays correctly.
pantry_quarantine_features.save_persistence: ✅ PASS - Quarantine items save with user_ingredient_id (not ingredient_id). 'Pendiente' pill appears in pantry list.
pantry_quarantine_features.category_grouping: ✅ PASS - 'Por categoría' view shows 'PENDIENTES DE VALIDACIÓN' group at bottom of list with quarantine items.
pantry_quarantine_features.search_results: ✅ PASS - Previously-created quarantine items appear in MOD-001 search with terracotta 'PENDIENTE' pill.
pantry_quarantine_features.edit_modal: ✅ PASS - MOD-002 shows 'Pendiente de validación' subtitle, base-unit-only dropdown, and helper text.
pantry_quarantine_features.catalog_regression: ✅ PASS - Catalog ingredients work normally: no 'Pendiente' banner, multiple units available, no pills.
pantry_quarantine_features.basic_toggle: ✅ PASS - 'Marcar como básico' toggle disables and mutes Cantidad/Unidad fields (bg-surface-secondary, cursor-not-allowed), clears quantity value.

recipe_duplicate_warning.step1_warning: ✅ PASS - Dialog appears with title 'Ya tienes una receta llamada así' and body 'Tienes una receta titulada «TORTILLA DE PATATAS». ¿Quieres guardar esta de todos modos?'
recipe_duplicate_warning.step1_editar: ✅ PASS - 'Editar título' button closes dialog, keeps user on Step 1 (Paso 1 de 5), title input retains value, no draft created.
recipe_duplicate_warning.step1_guardar: ✅ PASS - 'Guardar igualmente' button proceeds to Step 2 (Paso 2 de 5), draft recipe created in DB.
recipe_duplicate_warning.normalization: ✅ PASS - Trim+lowercase comparison works: '  TORTILLA DE PATATAS  ' matches 'Tortilla de patatas'. Accent-sensitive: 'Tortillá de patatas' does NOT match.
recipe_duplicate_warning.drafts_excluded: ✅ VERIFIED - Code review confirms checkDuplicateTitle filters by .eq('is_draft', false), excluding drafts from duplicate check.
recipe_duplicate_warning.step5_warning: ✅ VERIFIED - Code review confirms same checkDuplicateTitle function called on Step 5 'Guardar receta'. Dialog shows with step=5.
recipe_duplicate_warning.step5_editar: ✅ VERIFIED - Code review confirms handleDuplicateCancel calls setStep(1) when warnStep === 5, navigating back to Step 1.

analytics_events.pantry_item_added_quarantine: ✅ Implemented - track('pantry_item_added_quarantine', { is_basic }) called in AddPantryItemModal.js line 321
analytics_events.recipe_duplicate_title_warning_shown: ✅ Implemented - track('recipe_duplicate_title_warning_shown', { step }) called in RecipeWizardScreen.js lines 219, 468
analytics_events.recipe_duplicate_title_warning_resolved: ✅ Implemented - track('recipe_duplicate_title_warning_resolved', { action, step }) called in RecipeWizardScreen.js lines 484-487, 495-498
